testCases.query: Search for a date picker component for my React app
expectedBehavior: Searches 21st.dev registry using the natural language description
Presents top 3 ranked results with component name, relevance score, and popularity
Includes install instructions and dependency list for each result
Detects project framework context from package.json

testCases.query: Find a sidebar component with collapsible sections
expectedBehavior: Attempts 21st-dev-magic MCP first for semantic search
Falls back to WebSearch with site:21st.dev if MCP unavailable
Still returns ranked results with preview and install commands
Asks user to select from results or generate from scratch

testCases.query: Are there any good table components on 21st.dev for my Next.js App Router project?
expectedBehavior: Reads package.json to detect Next.js App Router context
Checks for 'use client' directives in component source
Notes framework compatibility in result presentation

testCases.query: I want an animated pricing toggle component, show me the code
expectedBehavior: Searches registry and lets user pick a component
Shows full source code of the selected component
Lists npm install commands and peer dependencies

testCases.query: Build me a custom modal component from scratch
expectedBehavior: Should NOT generate a custom component from scratch
Should redirect to implement or ui-components skill for building components
Does not invoke 21st.dev search for build/implement requests
